examples: X-ray examination of thin slabs of rock sometimes reveals the ghostly outlines of tentacles, digestive tracts, and visual organs of a variety of marine creatures.
Lights reflected off dust-covered walls creating a ghostly luminescence.
Her face was ghostly pale with fright.
Inside the medieval tower, the couple held thousands of conversations with these ghostly communicators.
Many New Yorkers want to write off Mr Sharpton as a ghostly figure from another era.
